combined_text: Investment firm buys Brainerd-based Mills Fleet Farm "Investment firm buys Brainerd-based Mills Fleet Farm By Forum News Service on Jan 5, 2016 at 8:55 p.m. Kelly Humphrey / Forum News Service BRAINERD, Minn. – Mills Fleet Farm has new ownership.
